summary.en: Use Google Trends, keyword volume tools, and SEO data to gauge whether an unmet need is widespread enough to bother building for, and how it's trending over months or years.
summary.zh: 用 Google Trends、关键词工具、SEO 数据来判断某个未被满足的需求是否广泛到值得做,以及它在月 / 年级别上的走势。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Search Trend Analysis

headline.en: Search volume can reveal demand signals — and its limits.
headline.zh: 搜索量能揭示需求信号，也会暴露它的边界。

story.en: Google Flu Trends used aggregated search queries related to flu symptoms to estimate influenza activity faster than traditional reporting. The project showed the power of search behavior as a leading signal, but later overestimated flu levels, making it a useful cautionary example: search trends are discovery evidence, not proof by themselves.
story.zh: Google Flu Trends 使用与流感症状相关的聚合搜索查询来更快估计流感活动。这个项目展示了搜索行为作为领先信号的力量，但后来也出现过高估流感水平的问题，因此它是一个很好的警示案例：搜索趋势是发现性证据，不能单独当作证明。

examples.source: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Search Trend Analysis, pp. 126-129; Ginsberg et al. · Nature · Detecting influenza epidemics using search engine query data · 2009; Lazer et al. · Science · The Parable of Google Flu · 2014

text.en:
Replace this with one fragile market-pull assumption.

e.g. search behavior for [problem/category] is growing enough among [market] to justify entering now.
text.zh:
替换成一条最脆弱的市场拉力假设。

例如：[市场] 对 [问题 / 品类] 的搜索行为增长足够明显，值得我们现在进入。

text.en:
We believe search demand for [problem/category] shows a sustained upward trend in [market].

To verify, we will analyze 20 keyword clusters across Google Trends, keyword tools, forums, and competitor traffic within 3 days.

And measure trend slope, seasonality, search volume, related-query growth, and intent quality.

We are right if ≥ 3 high-intent clusters grow ≥ 30% year-over-year and have enough volume to support acquisition tests.
text.zh:
我们相信 [市场] 中 [问题 / 品类] 的搜索需求呈持续上升趋势。

为了验证，我们将 在 3 天内用 Google Trends、关键词工具、论坛和竞品流量分析 20 个关键词簇。

并测量 趋势斜率、季节性、搜索量、相关查询增长和意图质量。

如果 ≥ 3 个高意图关键词簇同比增长 ≥ 30%，且搜索量足够支撑获客测试 = 通过。

text.en:
Build keyword map: start with 5 seed terms from interviews, then expand to 20 clusters: problem, solution, competitor, “how to”, and price/comparison keywords. Separate awareness from purchase intent.

Collect data: use Google Trends, Keyword Planner / Ahrefs / Semrush, Reddit/forum search, YouTube, and competitor landing-page traffic. Pull 24-month trend, geography, related queries, and top pages.

Synthesize: score each cluster for volume, growth, intent, competitive difficulty, and match to your segment. Pick the top 3 clusters for a follow-on Smoke Test or content landing page.
text.zh:
建立关键词地图：从访谈中的 5 个种子词开始，扩展到 20 个关键词簇：问题、方案、竞品、how-to、价格 / 对比词。区分认知意图和购买意图。

收集数据：使用 Google Trends、Keyword Planner / Ahrefs / Semrush、Reddit / 论坛搜索、YouTube 和竞品落地页流量。拉取 24 个月趋势、地域、相关查询和头部页面。

综合判断：按搜索量、增长、意图、竞争难度和客群匹配度给每个词簇打分。选出前 3 个词簇，用于后续 Smoke Test 或内容落地页。

text.en:
Pass: ≥ 3 high-intent clusters show ≥ 30% YoY growth, stable or rising 6-month trend, and estimated monthly volume ≥ [threshold].

Fail: growth is only seasonal/news-driven, search intent is educational not problem-solving, or volume is too small.

Inconclusive: demand exists but intent is unclear; run keyword-specific landing pages to measure conversion.
text.zh:
通过：≥ 3 个高意图词簇同比增长 ≥ 30%，近 6 个月稳定或上升，预计月搜索量 ≥ [阈值]。

失败：增长只来自季节 / 新闻，搜索意图是泛学习而非解决问题，或量太小。

不清晰：需求存在但意图不清；跑关键词定制落地页测转化。

text.en:
Fill in after running.

Clusters reviewed: __ ; High-intent growing clusters: __ ; Best cluster volume: __ /month; YoY growth: __ %.

Top query pattern: __ . Recommended acquisition test: __ . Verdict: validated / invalidated / inconclusive.
text.zh:
实验后填写。

已分析词簇：__；增长中的高意图词簇：__；最佳词簇月搜索量：__；同比增长：__ %。

最高频查询模式：__。建议获客测试：__。结论：已验证 / 已证伪 / 不清晰。

text.en:
Pick one based on the result.

• Persevere → build 1-3 keyword-specific Smoke Test landing pages and buy small search traffic.
• Pivot → reposition around the stronger query language or geography.
• Kill → if no high-intent demand exists, do not build SEO or paid search as the first channel.
text.zh:
根据结果选一个。

• Persevere → 做 1-3 个关键词定制 Smoke Test 落地页，并购买少量搜索流量。
• Pivot → 围绕更强查询语言或地域重新定位。
• Kill → 如果没有高意图需求，不要把 SEO 或付费搜索作为首个渠道。
